items.title: OpenAI says it accidentally hacked Hugging Face with a new AI system
items.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman. | Bloomberg via Getty Images OpenAI says its AI models mistakenly breached open-source AI platform Hugging Face during internal testing. In a blog post on Tuesday, OpenAI writes that GPT-5.6 Sol and "an even more capable pre-release model" discovered vulnerabilities within the...

items.title: Substack adds an AI detector to help spot blogs written by no one
items.description: Substack will now help users determine whether what they're reading may have been written by AI. items.title: Peak Design’s modular Field Bracket has a finder tag built-in
items.description: I am a very clumsy man. So clumsy, that I have AirTags hanging off practically every camera I own. Have I left my camera in an Uber? Yes. Have I left it on an airplane? Also yes. For me, finder tags are essential for my cameras. The problem is, strapping a finder tag to a camera is always cumbersome...
